sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3881" key="a(la/tinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁλ-άτινος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἅλας</etym>) <sense id="n3881.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made of salt</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
